title: Trump at Mount Rushmore warns of Communist ‘enemy’ in ‘optimistic’ speech celebrating America's birthday
summary: President Trump on Friday issued a “fierce rebuke” of communism as part of his Independence Day kickoff speech, injecting partisan rancor into remarks commemorating America’s 250th birthday with Mount Rushmore as the backdrop. title: Nearly half of Americans don’t know what America 250 is celebrating: Poll
summary: Ahead of America’s 250th anniversary on Saturday, almost half of Americans do not know what the day celebrates, according to a new survey released on Thursday. title: A Year Later, Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill Act Has a Clean Tech Silver Lining
summary: Trump’s One Big Beautiful Bill Act gutted the wind and solar credits at the heart of Biden’s Inflation Reduction Act. But a year on, the law’s preserved incentives for geothermal, advanced nuclear, and grid-scale storage may do more to cut global emissions than the credits it eliminated.

title: Farm Bill Primer: Programs Without a Budget Baseline

title: Can LLM Agents Select and Engage with Biological Tools?
